title: Classic Herbed Butter
description: Softened butter blended with fresh parsley, chives, and thyme. Keeps for two weeks refrigerated or freeze for longer. Finishes steaks, fish, chicken, vegetables, and bread.

ingredients.name: unsalted butter (1 stick), softened to room temperature
fresh thyme leaves, chopped (or rosemary, tarragon, or dill)
fine sea salt, or to taste
small garlic clove, minced or grated (optional)

instructions.text: Let butter sit at room temperature until soft enough to mix easily.
Combine softened butter with herbs, salt, pepper, and any optional additions. Mix with a fork or spatula until fully incorporated. Taste and adjust seasoning.
Shape the butter: spoon onto plastic wrap or parchment and roll into a log, twisting the ends to seal. Alternatively, pack into a small bowl or ramekin.
Refrigerate at least 1 hour until firm. Slice or scoop as needed.

notes:
Keeps refrigerated for 1–2 weeks well wrapped. Freezes well for longer storage -- slice the log into coins before freezing for easy single-use portions.

Uses: melt a pat over grilled steak, fish, or chicken; stir into steamed vegetables; spread on crusty bread or dinner rolls; top baked potatoes.
